definition.title: Duplicate Steps Test
definition.description: This playbook has two steps that share the same number, which violates sequential numbering.

steps.title: First Step
steps.content: Analyze the current situation and identify key factors.

steps.title: Duplicate Step
steps.content: This step reuses number 1, which should produce a warning.

steps.title: Final Step
steps.content: Summarize the findings and provide recommendations.
